---
name: Feature Request
about: Intake form for a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: ["feature", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Objective

<!-- What problem are we solving? What does success look like? -->

## Repo / Path

<!-- Which part of the codebase? e.g. src/autogen_api_agent/providers/, src/routes/api/chat/ -->

## Constraints

<!-- Tech stack, budget, performance, compatibility requirements, deadlines. -->

- Language / framework:
- Compatibility:
- Performance / SLOs:
- Deadline:

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Concrete, testable conditions. -->

- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Affected Systems

- [ ] Python backend
- [ ] SvelteKit frontend
- [ ] MCP server
- [ ] Telegram bot
- [ ] Docker / deploy
- [ ] CI
- [ ] Docs

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low — isolated, additive, easy to revert
- [ ] Medium — touches shared code or user-facing surface
- [ ] High — touches auth, data model, billing, or prod infra

## Required Checks

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration / smoke tests
- [ ] Manual QA
- [ ] Security review
- [ ] Perf review
- [ ] Docs update

## Deployment Target

- [ ] Vercel (frontend)
- [ ] Docker / self-host (backend)
- [ ] Both
- [ ] N/A (code-only change)

## Rollback Note

<!-- How do we disable or revert this feature if it misbehaves in prod? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, links, references, prior art. -->
